raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: Anime character intro transitioning into a slot machine spin.
hook.visual_action: An anime girl with rabbit ears stands in a festival crowd, followed by a slot machine reel spin.

scene_flow: Intro with an anime girl in a traditional festival setting.
Transition to a slot machine interface with moon-themed symbols spinning.
A 'Free Game' splash screen appears with a moonlit background.
The sequence repeats, showing the anime girl and slot mechanics again.
Final end card with the game logo and a call to action.
audience_proxy: Adult mobile gamers in Korea who enjoy social casino games and anime-style visuals.
